title: taraxacum nigrum
intro: Taraxacum nigrum, also known as the black dandelion or false dandelion, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Taraxacum nigrum is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum nigrum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
